patches.reason: Cloudflare docs and Hermes workflows use CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, not the generated long env var.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... and go build ./cmd/cf-domain-pp-cli pass.

patches.summary: Match Cloudflare Registrar wire params for search and check.
patches.reason: Live API requires q for domain-search and domains[] for domain-check; generated spec used query/domain_name.
patches.validated_outcome: Live domain-search and domain-check for domainpress.dev returned registrable with USD pricing.

patches.summary: Require --confirm-domain for live registration and disable stdin registration.
patches.reason: Domain purchase is destructive/paid; --agent sets --yes, so registration needs a typed target confirmation after price check.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... and go build ./cmd/cf-domain-pp-cli pass.

patches.summary: Create the SQLite store directory with private permissions.
patches.reason: Synced domain data and API responses should not be readable by other local users on shared machines.

patches.summary: Expose domain-check's real domains[] request body in the OpenAPI spec.
patches.reason: Tools that read spec.yaml directly should send the same Cloudflare wire shape as the CLI.
